summary_html: Prebiotic foods feed the good bacteria in your gut and become increasingly important after 40 as gut bacterial diversity declines. This complete guide ranks the top 10 prebiotic foods by inulin and fiber content, explains why gut health changes with hormones, and shows how to add prebiotics without digestive discomfort.
